case_title: CACERES, IVETTE et al VS JIMENEZ, CEASAR A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CACERES, IVETTE CACERES, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, CEASAR A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
